name: Maple Gold Mines Ltd.
description: Maple Gold Mines Ltd. is a well-funded Canadian gold exploration company focused on advancing its 100%-owned, district-scale Douay/Joutel Gold Project located in Québec’s prolific Abitibi Greenstone Belt. The company holds an extensive land package featuring an established multi-million-ounce gold mineral resource and several past-producing mines. With a commitment to growth through exploration and drilling, Maple Gold Mines aims to expand its mineral resources and make new discoveries, positioning itself as a key player in developing a significant new gold district within one of Canada's premier mining jurisdictions.
